name: delete-account
prompt: add a delete-account button to the account settings page
notes: input_tokens=25 is the fresh prompt-only tokens. cache_creation_input_tokens=85019 is first-read codebase context. cache_read_tokens=518355 is subsequent cached reads. The pre-estimate of ~7,200 input_tokens in the presentation script assumed a much smaller demo repo; the actual repo is 49 contracts + full Next.js app + Prisma + Stripe + Mailchimp (400k+ tokens total context). Tool call count: 9 actual vs ~22 estimate — Claude found the answer quickly using DEMO-SETUP.md orientation + planted DangerActionButton. Baseline is valid for the delta claim: Contract IDE uses ~1,400 tokens vs bare Claude's large context scan.
